panels.description: High-level target velocities, regardless of individual wheels

targets.query:
from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "motion_intent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "v" or r._field == "omega")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)

panels.title: Target high-level motion

panels.description: Commands sent to the backend to apply the desired velocities

confirmModal.body: Please confirm to update changed values
confirmModal.title: Confirm update request

payload.query:
from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "motion_intent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "v" or r._field == "omega")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(
      rowKey:["_time"],
      columnKey: ["_field"],
      valueColumn: "_value"
  )

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "omega" or r._field == "v")

confirmModal.body: Please confirm to update changed values
confirmModal.title: Confirm update request

payload.query:
from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wheel_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pwm_override")
  |> last()

targets.query:
from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wheel_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pwm_override")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wheel_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "actual_speed" or r._field == "target_speed")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)

panels.description: PWM signal to control wheel rotation

targets.query:
from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wheel_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pwm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)

panels.title: PWM

targets.query:
from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wheel_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)

panels.description: Error between target and actual rotation speed

targets.query:
from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wheel_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "actual_speed" or r._field == "target_speed")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> pivot(
      rowKey: ["_time"],
      columnKey: ["_field", "wheel_side"],
      valueColumn: "_value"
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      left_error: r.target_speed_left - r.actual_speed_left,
      right_error: r.target_speed_right - r.actual_speed_right
  }))

panels.title: Rotation speed error

targets.query:
from(bucket: "robot")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wheel_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "actual_angle")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
